use_cases: Displaying comparative metrics across multiple categories in a horizontal layout
Visualizing survey results or polling data with category labels
Showing ranked performance metrics with trend indicators
Dashboard data visualization for business analytics
Resource allocation or budget distribution visualization
ai_summary: A horizontal bar chart component built with reaviz library featuring animated bars, customizable axes, gridlines, and metric indicators with trend icons. Uses framer-motion for smooth entrance animations and supports tooltip integration for detailed data exploration. Ideal for displaying comparative data, rankings, or categorical metrics in dashboard interfaces.
